metadata.title: Mai Fitar Launuka Daga Hoto Kyauta – Palet Daga Kowane Hoto
metadata.description: Đora hoto ko alama kuma fitar da launuka masu rinjaye har zuwa 12 tare da lambobin HEX da RGB. Cikakke don UI, alama da kafofin watsa labarai.

hero.title: Mai Fitar Launuka Daga Hoto – Samu Palet Daga Kowane Hoto
hero.description: Đora hoto, alama, ko zane, kuma kayan aikin zai fitar da launuka masu rinjaye har zuwa 12 tare da lambobin HEX da RGB. Ana yin bincike a cikin browser na gida.

software.name: Mai fitar launuka daga hoto ta yanar gizo - mai samar da palet kyauta
alternateName: Fitar da palet launuka daga hoto ko alama
software.description: Mai fitar launuka daga hoto kyauta ta yanar gizo. Đora hoto, alama, ko zane kuma samu palet na launuka masu rinjaye har zuwa 12 tare da lambobin HEX da RGB. Ana yin sarrafa a cikin browser - ba a aika fayiloli zuwa sabar ba.
featureList: Fitar da launuka masu rinjaye har zuwa 12 ta atomatik
Binciken hotuna, alamomi, da zane-zanen vector
Lambobin launi a tsarin HEX da RGB
Tallafawa fayilolin PNG, JPG, da SVG
Yana tsallake pixels masu gaskiya a cikin fayilolin PNG
Sarrafa a cikin browser na gida - ba a aika hoto zuwa sabar ba

howTo.name: Yadda ake fitar da launuka daga hoto ko sura
howTo.description: Yadda ake fitar da launuka masu rinjaye daga hoto ko alama. Đora hoto a tsarin PNG, JPG, ko SVG, kuma kayan aikin zai samar da palet na launuka har zuwa 12 tare da lambobin HEX.

steps.name: Đora hoto
steps.text: Ja fayil zuwa wurin da aka kebantar ko zaɓi hoto daga na'urar ka. Tsare-tsare da ake tallafawa sune PNG, JPG, da SVG.

steps.name: Jira bincike
steps.text: Kayan aikin zai binciki hoton ta atomatik kuma ya fitar da launuka masu rinjaye.

steps.name: Kwafa launuka
steps.text: Kusa da kowane launi za ka sami maɓallin kwafa - ana kwafa lambar HEX zuwa clipboard na tsarin ka.

contentBlocks.title: Me ya sa ake fitar da launuka daga hoto?
contentBlocks.html:
Kowane hoto, alama, ko zane yana ɗauke da launuka da za su iya zama palet na launi da aka shirya. Mai fitar yana bincika hoton kuma yana nuna wane launuka ke rinjaye - tare da lambobin HEX da ƙimomin RGB da suke shirye don liƙawa a cikin aikin ka.

A aikace, wannan yana nufin maimakon zaɓar launuka da hannu a cikin aikace-aikacen zane (pixel da pixel), kana ɗora hoto guda ɗaya kuma ka sami jerin launuka masu tsari har zuwa 12. Wannan yana da amfani lokacin zaɓar launuka don gidan yanar gizo, ƙirƙirar hotunan kafofin watsa labarai masu daidaituwa, ko gina asalin gani daga kayan da ke akwai.

Ana yin dukan bincike a cikin browser na gida - ba a aika hoton zuwa kowane sabar ba.

contentBlocks.title: Yadda ake amfani da mai fitar launuka daga hoto
contentBlocks.description: Dukan tsarin yana ɗaukar 'yan daƙiƙu kaɗan kawai:

items.title: 1. Ɗora hoto
items.description: Ja fayil zuwa wurin da aka kebantar ko zaɓi shi daga na'urar ka. Tsare-tsare da ake tallafawa sune PNG, JPG, da SVG.

items.title: 2. Jira bincike
items.description: Kayan aikin zai binciki hoton ta atomatik kuma ya fitar da launuka masu rinjaye har zuwa 12.

items.title: 3. Kwafa launukan da kake buƙata
items.description: Kusa da kowane launi akwai maɓallin kwafa - lambar HEX ko RGB tana zuwa clipboard kuma ana iya liƙa ta kai tsaye a cikin aikin ka.

contentBlocks.title: Yaya palet na launuka da aka fitar ke kama?
contentBlocks.demoHtml:
#2C5F2D
#97BC62
#DAA520
#4169E1
#8B4513
#DC143C
#2F4F4F
#FF6347

Misalin launuka da aka fitar daga hoton yanayi
contentBlocks.html:
Bayan ɗora hoto, mai fitar yana nuna jerin launuka masu rinjaye waɗanda aka tsara daga mafi yawa zuwa mafi ƙaranci. Kowane launi yana nuna lambar HEX da ƙimar RGB - shirye don liƙawa a cikin CSS, Figma, ko kowane aikace-aikacen zane.

Adadin launukan da aka fitar ya dogara da abun cikin hoto. Hoton shimfiɗa zai samar da palet mai wadata (launuka 8–12), yayin da alama mai sauƙi mai launuka biyu za ta samar da ƙananan abubuwa.

contentBlocks.title: Wane hotuna ne ke ba da mafi kyawun sakamako a cikin mai fitar launuka?
contentBlocks.description: Ingancin palet da aka fitar ya dogara da nau'in hoton da aka ɗora:

items.title: Alamomi da zane-zane masu iyakantaccen palet
items.description: Hotuna masu launuka kaɗan da suka rabu a fili suna ba da sakamako mafi daidaito - mai fitar yana gano kowane launi daidai.

items.title: Hotuna masu bayyananniyar jigo
items.description: Hotunan kayayyaki, ɗakin ciki, ko shimfiɗa kuma suna samar da palet masu amfani, amma suna ɗauke da ƙarin inuwa - ciki har da launukan inuwa da hasken wuta.

items.title: Fayilolin PNG masu bayan gaskiya
items.description: Ana tsallake pixels masu gaskiya ta atomatik yayin bincike. Idan kana son fitar da launuka kawai daga abu (misali, alama), yi amfani da fayil PNG ba tare da baya ba.

items.title: Hotuna ba tare da babban bayan launi guda ɗaya ba
items.description: Lokacin da baya ke ɗaukar yawancin yankin hoto, launinsa yana mamaye sakamakon. Kafin ɗorawa, yi la'akari da yanke hoton zuwa yankin da kake so.

contentBlocks.title: Yaya fitar da launuka daga hoto ke aiki?
contentBlocks.description: Bayan ɗora fayil, kayan aikin yana yin matakai da yawa a baya - ana yin dukan bincike a cikin browser na gida:

items.title: Canza girman hoto
items.description: Ana canza girman hoton zuwa kusan 240 pixels faɗi. Wannan yana hanzarta bincike ko da don hotuna manya sosai, ba tare da shafar daidaiton gano launi ba.

items.title: Tattara launuka masu kama
items.description: Ana bincika kowane pixel, kuma ana tattara inuwa masu kama tare. Shuɗi biyu da suka kusan yi kama suna zama launi guda ɗaya a cikin palet.

items.title: Zaɓar launuka masu rinjaye
items.description: Algorithm yana zaɓar launuka da ke rufe mafi girman yankin hoto. Sakamakon jerin launuka ne har zuwa 12 da aka tsara daga mafi yawa zuwa mafi ƙaranci.

items.title: Tsallake pixels masu gaskiya
items.description: A cikin fayilolin PNG masu bayan gaskiya, waɗannan yankuna ba a haɗa su a cikin bincike ba - mai fitar yana bincika launuka masu ganuwa kawai. Dukan tsarin yawanci yana ɗaukar ƙasa da daƙiƙa guda.

items.title: Mai fitar ya dawo da launuka ƙasa da 12
items.description: Adadin launukan da aka fitar ya dogara da abun cikin hoto. Alama mai sauƙi mai launuka biyu za ta ba da sakamako 2–3 - wannan hali ne na daidai. Kayan aikin ba ya ƙara launuka na wucin gadi; yana fitar da waɗanda suke bayyana a zahiri a cikin hoton kawai.

items.title: Launuka da ba a tsammani sun bayyana a cikin palet
items.description: Waɗannan na iya zama launukan inuwa, gradient, ko hasken wuta - pixels a cikin waɗannan yankuna suna da launuka daban da na abu mai ganuwa da farko. Amfani da hoto mai launuka masu daidaituwa ko yanke yankuna masu duhu zai inganta sakamako.

items.title: Launin baya yana mamaye sakamakon
items.description: Lokacin da baya ke rufe yanki mafi girma fiye da abun kansa, launinsa zai bayyana na farko a jerin. Mafita: yi amfani da fayil PNG mai bayan gaskiya ko yanke hoton domin abun ya ɗauki ƙarin sararin firam.

items.title: Ba a karɓar fayil a cikin mai fitar ba
items.description: Kayan aikin yana tallafawa tsarin PNG, JPG, da SVG kawai. Fayiloli a cikin tsare-tsare na daban (GIF, TIFF, HEIC, PDF) suna buƙatar juya tukuna.

contentBlocks.title: Menene ke sa mai fitar launuka daga hoto ya bambanta?

items.title: Bincike na gida - hoton ba ya barin kwamfutar ka
items.description: Ana yin dukan fitar da launuka a cikin browser. Ba a aika hoton zuwa kowane sabar ba, kuma bayan rufe shafin, ana cire bayanai daga ƙwaƙwalwa.

items.title: Launuka masu rinjaye har zuwa 12 daga hoto guda ɗaya
items.description: Kayan aikin yana fitar da launuka har zuwa 12 da aka tsara daga mafi yawa - isasshe don gina cikakken palet na launin aiki.

items.title: Tsarin hotuna uku masu shahara
items.description: Tsare-tsare da ake tallafawa sune PNG, JPG, da SVG. Fayilolin PNG masu bayan gaskiya suna ba da mafi kyawun sakamako saboda ana tsallake pixels masu gaskiya ta atomatik.

items.title: Lambobin HEX da RGB da suke shirye don liƙawa
items.description: Kowane launi da aka fitar yana zuwa tare da lambar HEX (misali, #2C5F2D) da ƙimar RGB. Ana iya kwafa lambar zuwa clipboard kuma a liƙa ta kai tsaye a cikin CSS, Figma, ko Photoshop.

contentBlocks.title: Ina ake amfani da launuka da aka fitar daga hoto

items.title: Gina asalin gani
items.description: Ɗora hoton da ke ɗaukar yanayin alama - shimfiɗa, ɗakin ciki na gidan abinci, hoton kayan - kuma fitar da launuka a matsayin farkon palet na alama.

items.title: Hotunan kafofin watsa labarai
items.description: Fitar da launuka daga hoton kayan kuma yi amfani da su a matsayin baya ko ƙari a cikin hotuna. Bugawa da suka dogara da launuka daga tushe ɗaya suna kama daidai a kan bayanan martaba.

items.title: Daidaita launuka zuwa gidan yanar gizo
items.description: Fitar da launuka daga alama kuma yi amfani da su a matsayin palet na launin gidan yanar gizo - launin farko, launin ƙari, inuwar baya. Ana liƙa lambobin HEX kai tsaye a cikin CSS.

items.title: Faɗaɗa palet da ke akwai
items.description: Ana iya amfani da launin tushe da aka fitar a cikin mai samar da palet na launi don ƙirƙirar cikakken saitin launuka masu jituwa dangane da ka'idar launi.

contentBlocks.title: Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi game da mai fitar launuka daga hoto

items.question: Shin mai fitar launuka daga hoto yana buƙatar rajista?
items.answer: A'a. Kayan aikin kyauta ne gaba ɗaya kuma ba ya buƙatar shiga ko rajista. Ana bincika hoton a cikin browser na gida - ba a aika shi zuwa kowane sabar ba. Bayan rufe shafin, ana cire dukan bayanai.
items.answerSchemaText: A'a. Kayan aikin kyauta ne kuma ba ya buƙatar rajista. Ana bincika hoton a cikin browser na gida.

items.question: Yaya mai fitar launuka ya bambanta da mai samar da palet?
items.answer: Mai fitar yana ciro launuka daga hoton da ke akwai - yana bincika hoto kuma yana nuna wane launuka ke rinjaye a ciki. Mai samar da palet na launi yana aiki ta wata hanya: kana ba da launi guda ɗaya na tushe, kuma kayan aikin yana ƙirƙirar saituna masu jituwa dangane da ka'idar launi. Kayan aikin biyu suna cikar juna - za ka iya fitar da launi daga hoto sannan ka yi amfani da shi a matsayin tushe a cikin mai samar da palet.
items.answerSchemaText: Mai fitar yana ciro launuka daga hoto. Mai samar yana ƙirƙirar palet daga launin tushe. Kayan aikin biyu suna cikar juna.

items.question: Nawa launuka mai fitar ke cirowa daga hoto guda ɗaya?
items.answer: Kayan aikin yana fitar da launuka masu rinjaye har zuwa 12. Daidaitaccen adadin ya dogara da abun cikin hoto - idan zane yana da launuka biyu kawai (misali, alama mai sauƙi), sakamakon zai ƙunshi ƙananan abubuwa. Ana tsara launuka daga mafi yawa zuwa mafi ƙaranci.
items.answerSchemaText: Launuka masu rinjaye har zuwa 12, da aka tsara daga mafi yawa zuwa mafi ƙaranci.

items.question: Wane tsarin hotuna ne mai fitar launuka ke tallafawa?
items.answer: Tsare-tsare da ake tallafawa sune PNG, JPG (JPEG), da SVG. Fayilolin PNG masu bayan gaskiya suna ba da sakamako mafi kyau saboda ana tsallake pixels masu gaskiya yayin bincike - kayan aikin yana mayar da hankali kan launukan abu kansa.
items.answerSchemaText: PNG, JPG, da SVG. PNG mai bayan gaskiya yana ba da mafi kyawun sakamako.

items.question: A wane tsari nake samun lambobin launuka da aka fitar?
items.answer: Ana nuna kowane launi tare da lambar HEX (misali, #2C5F2D) da ƙimar RGB (misali, rgb(44, 95, 45)). Ana iya kwafa lambar zuwa clipboard kuma a liƙa ta kai tsaye a cikin CSS, Figma, Photoshop, ko kowane aikace-aikacen zane.
items.answerSchemaText: HEX (misali, #2C5F2D) da RGB (misali, rgb(44, 95, 45)). Ana iya kwafa zuwa clipboard.

items.question: Zan iya kwafa dukan launukan palet a lokaci guda?
items.answer: A yanzu kayan aikin yana ba da damar kwafa launuka ɗaya-ɗaya - kusa da kowane launi akwai maɓalli da ke kwafa lambar HEX zuwa clipboard. Ana iya liƙa lambar da aka kwafa nan da nan a cikin Figma, Photoshop, CSS, ko kowane aikace-aikace.
items.answerSchemaText: Ana kwafa launuka ɗaya-ɗaya ta hanyar maɓallin kwafa kusa da kowane launi.
